summary: I checked `git diff main...HEAD` and confirmed this iteration-3 branch of the Define phase touches only `.pipeliner/**` artifact files (requirements.md, discovery_notes.md, open_questions.md, and step metadata) — no Ruby/Rails or worker source code was added or changed anywhere under `app/`, `config/`, `db/`, `lib/`, or `worker/src`. Since there is nothing runnable to build, test, or lint, and running the Rails test suite/db tasks here would risk touching the shared live development database per the safety rule, I wrote `.pipeliner/phases/01-define/main/test-critic/verdict.json` with `verdict: "not_applicable"` and no findings.
